name: awesome-python-standards
description: Python 现代开发规范 - 类型注解、Pydantic、虚拟环境、FastAPI、Loguru 最佳实践

scripts.version:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && cd cli && npm version patch --no-git-tag-version
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && cd cli && npm version minor --no-git-tag-version
scripts.version:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && cd cli && npm version major --no-git-tag-version
